_note: Topic spec for the sponsor-match gold grader (evidence-grounded judge). Per fixture: id, the sponsor TOPIC the judge grades against, `pool` (MeSH people-search query to surface candidates — recall only, NOT the grade), `oa` (OpenAlex topical-work search term for the evidence bundle). `paste` in the fixtures file is the realistic sponsor description; the judge grades against `topic`.
_probes: rarity → rarity-scleroderma + rarity2-cystic-fibrosis + als (rare, few experts must out-rank common-area). redundant-phrasing → heme-malignancy (paste repeats leukemia/lymphoma/myeloma). method-not-disease → ml-in-medicine, single-cell-genomics. over-broad → cardiovascular-broad. acronym/ambiguous → multiple-sclerosis (MS), als (ALS).

topics.topic: metabolic reprogramming and cellular metabolism in cancer
cancer immunotherapy: checkpoint blockade, T-cell exhaustion, tumor immune microenvironment
topics.pool: cancer immunotherapy checkpoint inhibitor T cell

topics.topic: systemic sclerosis (scleroderma), a rare autoimmune connective-tissue disease
hematologic malignancies (blood cancers): leukemia, lymphoma, and multiple myeloma
heart failure and cardiomyopathy (HFrEF/HFpEF), cardiac remodeling
Alzheimer's disease and related dementias: amyloid/tau, neurodegeneration
health equity and disparities: social determinants of health, structural inequities in care
topics.pool: health disparities social determinants of health equity

topics.topic: gene and cell therapy: viral-vector gene delivery, CRISPR gene editing, engineered cell therapy
machine learning / artificial intelligence applied to medicine and clinical prediction (a METHOD, not a disease)
topics.pool: machine learning artificial intelligence clinical prediction

topics.topic: single-cell and spatial genomics: scRNA-seq, spatial transcriptomics (a PLATFORM/method)
topics.pool: single cell RNA sequencing spatial transcriptomics

topics.topic: cardiovascular disease, broadly (an intentionally OVER-BROAD sponsor scope)
multiple sclerosis (MS), the demyelinating CNS disease (NOT mass spectrometry / mitral stenosis)
cystic fibrosis (CF), a rare inherited disease of the CFTR channel
amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS), a rare fatal motor-neuron disease
